item.title: Amex Is Upgrading Resy to Win the Restaurant Reservation Wars Once and for All
item.description: American Express is folding Tock into Resy, creating a single, 25,000 venue-strong giant to drive consumer spending and credit card loyalty and leave ...

item.title: How Much Is Squatty Potty Worth? Founder’s Disturbing Arrest Shines Spotlight on ‘Shark Tank’ Product
item.description: Robert Edwards pleaded not guilty to federal charges of receipt of child sexual abuse material.

item.title: MasterClass Is Working With OpenAI to Build a Business School for the AI Era
item.description: The new program, which also involves the University of Chicago, is called MasterClass Executive. Mark Cuban is among the instructors.

item.title: Sign Up Now: Meet Gary Vaynerchuk and Poppi’s Allison Ellsworth in This Exclusive Inc. Livestream Today at 2 p.m. ET
This Protein Could Help Keep Your Brain Young, Study Says
item.description: Scientists revealed how the protein can be used to rejuvenates neural stem cells.
